reason_for_decision: The article gives beginners a clear explanation of AOA, separates direction from full geolocation, and provides enough accuracy context and workflow relevance to pass without revision.
strengths: The article explains early that one bearing is not the same as a full location, which prevents the main beginner misunderstanding.
It connects AOA to practical RF workflows such as cueing, interference hunting, and multisensor security use.
The accuracy section adds useful judgment about multipath, calibration, site geometry, and signal quality.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
